---
title: "Travel Demand Modeling"
output:
  html_document:
    highlight: tango
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r}
test<-clean %>% filter(!is.na(Count)) %>% 
  group_by(Date2, `station number`) %>% 
  summarise(Count=sum(Count)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(Date2, Count, group=`station number`, colour=`station number`))+
  geom_line(size=.75) +
   scale_x_date(labels = date_format("%m-%Y"), date_breaks = "1 month") + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme (axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1, size=14),
         axis.text.y = element_text(size=14),
         title = element_text(size=18)) + 
  xlab("") + ylab("") +
  ggtitle("CalTrans Daily Traffic Counts") +
  transition_reveal(Date2)
anim_save("caltrans_hourly1.gif",test,width = 1000, height = 500)
```
